dimensions.name: Governance Awareness
dimensions.rationale: The trace explicitly includes a 'rules-context-loader' step which successfully validated against its schema. This demonstrates a proactive approach to incorporating governance constraints before architectural generation.

dimensions.name: Causal Reasoning Depth
dimensions.rationale: The orchestration flow follows a logical progression from rule ingestion to pattern application. The high completion token count in the 'approved-adr-to-pattern' step suggests a detailed derivation of architectural decisions from the input ADR.

dimensions.name: Architectural Tension Analysis
dimensions.rationale: The transition from an ADR (Architectural Decision Record) to a Pattern implies the resolution of trade-offs. While the specific trade-off text is not visible, the structure of the 'approved-adr-to-pattern' prompt version v1 is designed to surface these tensions.
